parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While on, the will receive data from Photoshop.

parameters.name: address
parameters.label: Address
parameters.description: The IP address of the computer that Photoshop is running on.  If Photoshop is running on the same computer as TouchDesigner, can be used in this parameter.  Otherwise, Photoshop's Remote Connection di

parameters.name: password
parameters.label: Password
parameters.description: Enter the password specified in Photoshop's Remote Connection dialog.

parameters.name: imageformat
parameters.label: Image Format
parameters.description: Determines what format the Photoshop stream is transferred with.

parameters.name: lockeddocument
parameters.label: Locked Document Name
parameters.description: This parameter can be used to lock the Photoshop In 's input to a particular file that is open in Photoshop.

parameters.name: locktocurrent
parameters.label: Lock to Current Document
parameters.description: click this button to lock the Photoshop In 's input to the currently active file in Photoshop.  Clicking this button fills out the parameter above Locked Document Name.

parameters.name: unlock
parameters.label: Unlock
parameters.description: Clears the Locked Document Name parameter.  When unlocked, the Photoshop In will grab whichever document is currently active in Photoshop.

parameters.name: updatemode
parameters.label: Update Mode
parameters.description: Determines how the image is updated.

parameters.name: maxupdaterate
parameters.label: Max Update Rate
parameters.description: The maximum update rate of the image when Update Mode is set to automatic.

parameters.name: update
parameters.label: Update
parameters.description: Click to anually update the image.
